## For College      Users

[Login](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/apps/Login.aspx)

## SPPU's Degree Plus Platform       Applicants

[Register](https://degreeplus.in/)

## Smart Training and Innovation Center(STIC)

![](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/assets/images/Innovate.png)[More Info](https://sticonline.in/)

![](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/assets/images/network.png)[Admission](https://sticonline.in/)

## Why Incubation Centre

Centre for Innovation, Incubation & Linkages C-BRIDGE (Center for
Business, Research, Incubation, Development, Growth and
Entrepreneurship) at SPPU is set up to promote innovative startups
through the University ecosystem. Centre would facilitate and hone
ideas and innovations that are useful to the society and address
some of the problems faced through development of product, process
and services.


![whyIncubation](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/assets/images/whyIncubator.png)

## Solution Seekers

- Challenges can be posted to our website.

- We call ‘Solvers’ to submit the solution.

- You evaluate the proposed solutions & select
those to an award.


- You will receive contact details of all awarded solvers allowing you to directly engage with winning solvers as
consultants/Startups.


[Apply Now](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/openInnovations.aspx)

## Problem Solvers

- Register as a solver in order to see challenge
details & submit solutions, you’ll need to sign up
to join our Solver network.



- Log in or register to see full details of the challenge.

- Develop your own solution.

- Deadlines to be met in solving.

[Apply Now](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/openInnovations.aspx)

## Partnerships

#### Pune Smart City Development      Corporation Limited

![](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/assets/images/PSCDCL.png)

MoU was signed between Savitribai Phule Pune University's Centre for Innovation, Incubation
and
Linkages and Pune
smart
city development corporation. The innovative ideas and startups for smart city would be supported by pune Smart
city.
Start ups get mentorship and help for market access.


#### Maharashtra State Innovation      Society

![](https://iil.unipune.ac.in/assets/images/MSiNS.png)

Received letter of intent to establish Incubation centre at Savitribai Phule Pune University from MSiNS - Government of
Maharashtra and funding of 5 cr. Flagged off by Governor Hon Vidyasagar Rao ji, Chief minister Hon Devendra Fadnavis,
Education minister Hon Vinod Tawde, Union minister, Hon. Suresh Prabhuji

data.summary: The page details the Centre for Innovation, Incubation & Linkages (C-BRIDGE) at Savitribai Phule Pune University, which aims to promote innovative startups within the university ecosystem. Key features include a platform for 'Solution Seekers' to post challenges and receive solutions from registered 'Solvers,' fostering innovation through collaboration. The Centre is supported by partnerships with organizations like Pune Smart City Development Corporation and Maharashtra State Innovation Society, which provide mentorship and financial aid for startups. Additionally, resources like application guidelines and contact information for assistance are readily available.

formState.extractPrompt: Extract the company details, following the schema.
